title: MBTI Personality Test
description: Answer 60 questions to discover your MBTI-style personality type.
instructions: Choose the option that feels most natural most of the time.
Do not overthink edge cases; your first instinct is usually useful.
There are no good or bad types. The result is a reflection tool, not a diagnosis.

options.text: Quiet time with your own thoughts
Time with people who energize you

options.text: Think first, then speak when your view is clear

questions.question: You feel calmer when decisions are

INTJ.title: The Strategic Architect
INTJ.summary: INTJs are independent systems thinkers who enjoy building long-range strategies and improving complex structures.
relationships: Needs room for solitude and focused work

INTP.title: The Curious Analyst
INTP.summary: INTPs are idea explorers who enjoy logic, models, and understanding how things work beneath the surface.
relationships: Connects through ideas and shared curiosity
growthPlan: Share work before it feels perfect

ENTJ.title: The Decisive Commander
ENTJ.summary: ENTJs are driven organizers who like setting ambitious goals and mobilizing people toward results.

ENTP.title: The Inventive Debater
ENTP.summary: ENTPs are energetic possibility seekers who enjoy reframing problems and testing new ideas.
relationships: Enjoys partners who can challenge them
growthPlan: Notice when debate stops being fun

INFJ.title: The Insightful Counselor
INFJ.summary: INFJs are meaning-driven observers who combine empathy with a strong sense of future direction.
relationships: Values emotional depth and shared values
Needs sincerity and quiet recovery time

INFP.title: The Idealistic Mediator
INFP.summary: INFPs are values-led creators who seek authenticity, compassion, and work that feels personally meaningful.

ENFJ.title: The Inspiring Guide
ENFJ.summary: ENFJs are people-centered leaders who organize energy around shared growth and meaningful goals.

ENFP.title: The Possibility Champion
ENFP.summary: ENFPs are enthusiastic connectors who bring imagination, warmth, and momentum to new possibilities.
relationships: Needs freedom, warmth, and honest enthusiasm

ISTJ.title: The Reliable Inspector
ISTJ.summary: ISTJs are practical stewards who value accuracy, responsibility, and steady execution.

ISFJ.title: The Supportive Protector
ISFJ.summary: ISFJs are attentive helpers who create stability through care, memory, and practical support.
relationships: Needs kindness and reliability in return

ESTJ.title: The Practical Organizer
ESTJ.summary: ESTJs are clear, action-oriented coordinators who like structure, accountability, and measurable progress.

ESFJ.title: The Caring Connector
ESFJ.summary: ESFJs are socially aware organizers who build warmth, continuity, and support in groups.
relationships: Shows love through care and presence

ISTP.title: The Tactical Problem Solver
ISTP.summary: ISTPs are hands-on analysts who like understanding systems through direct action and practical experimentation.

ISFP.title: The Gentle Creator
ISFP.summary: ISFPs are sensitive realists who express values through aesthetics, action, and quiet loyalty.
relationships: Needs acceptance and room to be themselves
growthPlan: Let trusted people see your intensity

ESTP.title: The Energetic Realist
ESTP.summary: ESTPs are bold responders who read the moment quickly and turn opportunities into action.
relationships: Needs energy, honesty, and shared experiences
Shows care through presence and action

ESFP.title: The Warm Performer
ESFP.summary: ESFPs are lively experiencers who bring warmth, spontaneity, and human energy into the room.
relationships: Needs affection, freedom, and shared fun
Shows care through attention and experiences
